scenario_content:
[Issue Title]: disappearing notifications

[Post 1]:
I have a weird issue. Frequently, notifications for received mails (gmail account) keep disappearing. Screen is off, mail comes, sound is played (often only a part), LED blinks once and thats it. after turning the screen on there is no notification bar entry, BUT account widget (envelope) shows correct count. it is slso inconsistent, happens sometimes, other times notification shows up and stays.
KDE Connect and Skins have access to notifications, but it is only this app suffering from this. also disabling those improved nothing.
Did not happen in CM 11 or pre 5.00x versions,
Is there anything I can do to help resolve this? logs, etc?
Cyanogenmod 12.1, K9 5.006 from play store.

[Post 2]:
Notifications are canceled when the message list or folder list is displayed. Depending on the Android version this may also be true if the screen is active behind the lock screen.
The widget displays the number of unread messages. So that's mostly unrelated to notifications.
Without more information there is nothing we can do about this. Unfortunately, I don't believe a debug log will contain relevant information to find out what's going on.

[Post 3]:
normally notifications would stay until manually  dismissed, but not in this case, even the notification drawer is empty. I understand this: "if the screen is active behind the lock screen" but isn't this the case only when the app is displayed behind the lockescreen? I never leave it open, and I'm using stock CM12.1 lockescreen. This also happens when the device is not locked, just screen is off.
so there is nothing i can do about it? I tried creating account from scratch, clearing data, uninstalling application, nothing helped. Also, I'm not 100% sure but I think other accounts are not affected by this. (4 accounts, all gmail, everything except ringtone and synchronization is identical).
On October 7, 2015 10:45:45 AM GMT+02:00, cketti notifications@github.com wrote:

Notifications are canceled when the message list or folder list is
displayed. Depending on the Android version this may also be true if
the screen is active behind the lock screen.
The widget displays the number of unread messages. So that's mostly
unrelated to notifications.
Without more information there is nothing we can do about this.
Unfortunately, I don't believe a debug log will contain relevant
information to find out what's going on.

Reply to this email directly or view it on GitHub:
#834 (comment)

[Post 4]:
I suddenly stopped getting notifications for incoming mail too. It may have been when I updated to Android 6; this on a Nexus 5. I haven't noticed a notification sound/ vibration for incoming mail so I don't know if they turned up and disappeared again, or if the notification was never generated in the first place. The widget showing new unread mail still works.

[Post 5]:
I've also stopped getting notification sounds most of the time.  I still get the notifications in the bar and the widget's unread count updates correctly, but most of the time the new mail notification sounds do not play.

[Post 6]:
i noticed something odd. i have 3 accounts set up (2 gmails) but only notifications from my main/default account dissapear. other stay, even if notification that disappeared came later.

[Post 7]:
accidental closing. my bad, sorry.

[Post 8]:
changing phones from Samsung Galaxy S4 (cyanogenmod 12.1) to LG G4 stock Marshmallow. clean install of k9mail, problem still persists. this is becoming unbearable.

[Post 9]:
since there is apparently no way to fix this...
@RolandSpencer here's a workaround that worked for me:
force close the application, clear all data and (instead of importing accounts from backup file) recreate all accounts from scratch, by hand (be careful around notifications settings).
belive me, I know how painful that can be (30 minutes for 3 accounts) - general settings, account settings, folder settings. in the end however - l think it's worth it, no more missedit app and whatever unread plugins.
sadly, I don't have the faulty (I think) backup file anymore, but I did notice some new things in the application after that - funny thing...

[Post 10]:
well, happiness didn't last long.
after changing "privacy" setting "hide subject in notifications" to always  - this issue came back.

[Post 11]:
+1 I've also got the issue... I don't get any K9 notifications.
EDIT: I'm a dunce... Somehow (not sure how--I never did this myself) in the Android notifications settings, K9 Mail was blocked... I unblocked it and it's working again. I suggest everybody else check this first. I'm running CM 12.1.

[Post 12]:
http://imgur.com/ZJAWPc3
that's not it, but thanks for looking. still an issue.

[Post 13]:
I have installed tasker and created a profile that intercepts k9 notifications and creates it's own notification with sound (mp3 file). notification is 3 second long, but I noticed that if k9 notification dissappears, that new one also gets cut (almost instantly). this also applies only to k9 notifications, no other app has that problem.

[Post 14]:
problem does not exist in nougat (7.1)

[Post 15]:
well, actually it does exist, but after all this time I rather suspect it's something like tasker/autonotification plugin/some other app. that said, it ONLY affects default account new mail notifications (and only k9mail).

[Post 16]:
I'm also experiencing this issue on Android 7.1. Could this issue be re-opened?
On those times when this happened to me, the screen of the phone is woken up, and sometimes the start of the notification sound is played. But then the screen goes off, notification led is inactive, and when I wake the screen, I don't have any notification. I'm only experiencing this quite rarely (or at least I've noticed it only rarely), but since it leads to the situation that I don't notice new mail at all (potentially in days), I think it is quite serious.
If the behaviour is that the notification is cancelled when the message list is displayed, is there maybe another event (which depicts the "displayed"), which could be reacted to? Is it so that Android 7.1 renders the app view also sometimes when it's in the background?
Or could there be a setting which would let the user choose to cancel the notification only when the mail is opened (and/or marked as read)?
I've tried to reproduce the issue by leaving k9 in the foreground (with the correct inbox message list open) and let the screen go off. I was hoping that this would lead to the app view being rendered in the background and that this would get the notification cancelled. But I've not been able reproduce the behaviour willingly.
Thanks already for looking into this.
J

[Post 17]:
I have this same issue. Android 8.1 fresh install of K9 and only one account configured. I have had the same problem with both notifications set to show and obfuscate. Has there been any progress on a fix, or any know workarounds?

[Post 18]:
Same issue here, also on Android 8.1. I use LineageOS with microG. Already tried everything, resetting, setting up the account by hand etc.

[Post 19]:
Please reopen @Valodim. Same issue here. Only happens with the (android main) Gmail account, but not with my other account. Thanks in advance for your investigation.

[Post 20]:
I have the same issue with Android 7.0 on the lg k20. Notifications show up while the sync notification appears, but disappear shortly after the sync notification is completed and leaves
system_prompt:
你是一位经验丰富的软件工程师和项目管理者，专注于软件系统中的价值风险分析。
你的任务是分析给定的GitHub Issue讨论内容，识别其中涉及的人类价值关切。

价值风险是指软件系统可能对用户或利益相关者的重要价值（如隐私、安全、公平性、可用性等）产生负面影响的潜在问题。
Issue讨论中可能包含用户对软件行为的不满、功能请求、Bug报告等，这些内容可能隐含对某些价值的关切。

## 价值模型参考
以下是可能涉及的价值类型及其定义：
### 人类价值主题 (L2)
- **HV1 (Conformity)**: Adhering to rules, regulations, guidelines, or commonly accepted standards during application use or development.
- **HV2 (Pleasure)**: Providing enjoyment and satisfaction to users when using the application.
- **HV3 (Dignity)**: Maintaining users’ sense of dignity, respect, and personal worth when interacting with the application.
- **HV4 (Inclusiveness)**: Enabling people from different backgrounds, languages, cultures, or knowledge levels to use the application.
- **HV5 (Sense_of_Belonging)**: Supporting users’ feeling of being connected to a group or community through the application.
- **HV6 (Freedom)**: Providing users with options and choices, and avoiding forced dependencies on specific services or workflows.
- **HV7 (Independence)**: Reducing dependency on third-party services or external systems.
- **HV8 (Wealth)**: Considering the monetary or economic cost associated with using the application.
- **HV9 (Privacy)**: Protecting users’ personal information and addressing concerns about data collection or tracking.
- **HV10 (Security)**: Protecting users from external threats or attacks when using the application.

### 系统价值主题 (L3)
- **SV1 (Trust)**: Compelling users to believe that an application is harmless.
- **SV2 (Correctness)**: Ensuring that the application provides expected information and behavior.
- **SV3 (Compatibility)**: Supporting a range of user devices and operating systems.
- **SV4 (Portability)**: Allowing the application to be migrated to other devices.
- **SV5 (Reliability)**: Reducing the occurrence of application failures.
- **SV6 (Efficiency)**: Reducing the time and effort required to perform tasks within the application.
- **SV7 (Energy_Preservation)**: Reducing power or energy consumption during application use.
- **SV8 (Usability)**: Improving the ease of use of the application.
- **SV9 (Accessibility)**: Improving access to information or functionality, particularly for users with special needs.
- **SV10 (Longevity)**: Ensuring prolonged availability of the application in the future.

## 任务
请你以一个软件工程师和项目管理者的视角，回答以下两个问题：

（1）上述Issue讨论是否涉及价值风险？请回答"是"或"否"。

（2）如果涉及价值风险，可能涉及哪些价值风险？请从上述价值模型中选择相关的价值类型，并说明原因。

## 输出格式
请严格按照以下JSON格式输出：
```json
{
  "has_value_risk": true/false,
  "identified_values": [
    {
      "value_id": "价值ID（如HV1, SV1等）",
      "value_name": "价值名称",
      "confidence": 0.0-1.0之间的置信度,
      "reasoning": "识别该价值风险的理由"
    }
  ],
  "overall_analysis": "整体分析说明"
}
```
